app.title: DeepClaude – Claude Code agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro
app.author: alattaran
app.description: Using Claude Code with DeepSeek V4 Pro
proposed_tests: Run DeepClaude on a sample dataset and measure the accuracy of the results
